top_signals.title: China’s National Team Seen Reducing ETF Stakes 90% in First Half
top_signals.summary: China’s so-called National Team will probably cut its holdings of exchange-traded funds that track domestic equities by about 90% by the end of the first half, according to Bloomberg Intelligence.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: This shocking West End play is like Netflix’s Adolescence but live
top_signals.summary: Equus play review and star rating: ★★★★ If a psychological drama about a teenager with an erotic fixation on horses sounds controversial, imagine how the idea landed 53 years ago. Peter Shaffer’s Equus is still platforming taboo-breaking conversations around mental health 53 years after its world premiere, which is probably more a criticism of our [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
